description: A technician has repaired a hydraulic pump. They must document the work performed and the parts used for compliance.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the work order for the hydraulic pump repair.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the correct work order.

nodes.task_description: Document the steps taken to repair the pump and list the part numbers of all replacement components used.

expected_outcome.value: Agent writes a clear, detailed description of the repair and lists all parts.

nodes.task_description: Certify the work as complete by signing off on the work order, making the component serviceable again.

expected_outcome.value: Agent completes the electronic sign-off, updating the component's status.
